title: sonification v0.1.0: Real-Time Audio Synthesis for GenesisAeon Entropy Dynamics
description: sonification v0.1.0 provides real-time audio synthesis for the GenesisAeon ecosystem, mapping UTAC-Logistic ODE output, CREP scores (Coherence·Resonance·Emergence·Poetics), and phase-transition events to musical parameters via frequency modulation and granular synthesis. Designed as the optional [audio] plugin for genesis-os, it enables direct perceptual feedback of entropy dynamics and self-organized criticality. Dual-licensed: GPLv3-or-later (code) + CC BY 4.0 (documentation).
